Home / Alternatives to Mixpanel / Mixpanel vs Matomo

Mixpanel vs Matomo

A side-by-side look at Mixpanel (the paid SaaS) and Matomo (the open source alternative). Use this page to decide if the switch fits your team and workflow.

Mixpanel Matomo
Tagline Product analytics and funnels. Full-featured open source web analytics.
License Proprietary SaaS GPL-3.0
Pricing Free up to 20M events/month; Growth from $28/month. Free to self-host · optional paid hosted plan
Self-host option No Yes — difficulty 3/5
Hosted cloud available Yes (only option) Yes
Desktop apps Varies by product Web only
Mobile apps Official apps typically available iOS, Android
Ad slot — between tables

Best for

Funnels, cohorts and goals on your own infrastructure.

Matomo strengths

  • Feature parity with GA for most reports.
  • Heatmaps, session recordings and goal funnels available.
  • Strong GDPR tooling.

Matomo weaknesses

  • Heavier to self-host (PHP + DB + cron).
  • Some premium features are paid plugins.
  • UI can feel dense.

What's the catch with Mixpanel?

  • Pricing grows steeply beyond free tier.
  • No self-hosted option.
  • Overkill for simple web traffic.

Still unsure?

Check the full list of alternatives to Mixpanel: see Mixpanel alternatives, or learn more about Matomo on its project page.

Simple web-level metrics without the cost.

Self-hosted event tracking on your own database.
